title: Memory
items: collection() → Graph (reactive node set with eviction)

title: AI surface
items: agentMemory(name, opts?) → Graph — factory wiring distill() + store/compact/size nodes
In-factory composition: knowledgeGraph() + vectorIndex() + lightCollection() + decay() + autoCheckpoint()
3D admission filter: admissionFilter3D({ scoreFn, persistenceThreshold, personalValueThreshold, requireStructured })
3-tier storage: permanent, active (with decay() scoring + maxActive), archived (autoCheckpoint adapter)
Default retrieval pipeline: vector search → KG adjacency → decay ranking → budget packing
Default reflection: periodic LLM consolidation via built-in consolidateTrigger
Memory observability: retrievalTrace node captures pipeline stages per retrieval run

title: CQRS
items: command(name, handler) — write-only node; guard rejects observe
event(name) — backed by reactiveLog; append-only, immutable
projection(events, reducer) — read-only derived node; guard rejects write
eventStore adapter interface — pluggable persistence (in-memory default)
Projection rebuilding: replay events to reconstruct read models
describe() output distinguishes command / event / projection / saga node roles
